title: AI & GTM Engineer
company_focus:
Go-to-market firm for transformative technologies offering
marketing, strategy, recruiting, and legal services
description:
Who is Serotonin Serotonin is the top go-to-market firm for
transformative technologies, specializing in marketing,
strategy, recruiting, and legal services. With a global team
of 90 across 15 countries, Serotonin has supported over 300
clients in consumer tech, web3 infrastructure, digital
assets, venture capital, and AI since its launch in 2020.
Delivering end-to-end go-to-market solutions across all
major marketing channels - including public relations,
growth marketing, on-chain analytics, content, research,
social, and design - Serotonin accelerates global
innovation. At the core of our business is the Serotonin
Platform, serving as a central nucleus for the web3
ecosystem, connecting builders and founders with essential
resources to drive business growth.

About the Role We’re building the AI layer across
Serotonin’s marketing operations. This role sits at the
intersection of AI tooling, GTM strategy, and marketing
execution. You will identify where AI can compress
timelines, improve output quality, and unlock competitive
advantage for our internal teams and clients - and then
actually build those systems. This isn’t a role for someone
who wants to talk about AI. It’s for someone who ships AI-
powered workflows regularly and iterates based on the next
best thing out there. You’ll work directly with marketing
leads, account teams, and clients across web3, consumer
tech, and AI - translating cutting-edge AI capabilities into
practical GTM impact.

Responsibilities

Requirements - Core Technical Skills

Analytical & Data Science Expertise

Blockchain & Web3 Experience

This position is ideal for someone who…

Benefits
responsibilities: Build and ship AI-powered workflows across Serotonin's marketing operations
Identify opportunities where AI can compress timelines, improve output quality, and unlock competitive advantage for internal teams and clients
Translate cutting-edge AI capabilities into practical GTM impact across web3, consumer tech, and AI sectors
Collaborate directly with marketing leads, account teams, and clients to deploy AI solutions
Iterate on AI systems based on emerging tools and technologies
Apply analytical and data science expertise to marketing and GTM strategies
Integrate blockchain and web3 knowledge into AI-driven marketing solutions
use_cases: Content generation and marketing execution acceleration
Competitive intelligence and market analysis for clients
Cross-channel marketing optimization across web3, consumer tech, and AI domains
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves directly building and shipping AI-powered
workflows and systems for marketing operations. The
candidate is expected to identify AI opportunities and then
actually build those systems, making this a hands-on AI
implementation role focused on deploying AI solutions
internally and for clients.
